ops.text: skills/getaway/SKILL.md's `trip set` example (step 5, ~line 87) uses plan keys the CLI rejects: `mileage_ceiling`, `max_finalists`, and `round_trip` all fail `require_keys` against PLAN_KEYS (cli/getaway/trips.py:46). The schema moved to `plan.trip_type: "round_trip"` and `plan.constraints.mileage_limit`; `max_finalists` isn't settable at all, yet cli/getaway/factors.py:253 still reads `plan.get("max_finalists", 6)` — a key the validator makes unreachable. Anyone following the skill's own example gets exit 64.
